what_they_want: X-ray micro-computed tomography (µCT) scanner with the following specifications: maximum scan resolution under 1 µm (for small samples); scan volumes ranging from a few mm³ for biological samples up to large soil volumes with diameter up to 20 cm and height of 40 cm; capability to examine multi-phase materials (water-solid-air-plant residues/tissue) and low-contrast biological samples (e.g., Daphnia); dynamic in-situ experimental capability for visualizing water flow in soil and root growth; high temporal dynamics (in the minute range); fully protected housing for operation in laboratory without room modifications.
